Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class MockBridgeService

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

A mock implementation of IBridgeService for unit testing. Allows testing ViewModels and services that depend on Bridge without a real WebView.

Deliverable 1.5: MockBridge for consumer unit testing. 

public sealed class MockBridgeService : IBridgeService
Inheritance
object
MockBridgeService
Implements
IBridgeService
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()
Extension Methods
BridgePluginExtensions.UsePlugin<TPlugin>(IBridgeService, IServiceProvider?)

Examples

var mock = new MockBridgeService();
mock.SetupExpose<IAppService>(); // Records that Expose was called
var proxy = mock.SetupProxy<IUiController>(new FakeUiController());

var vm = new MyViewModel(mock);
await vm.Initialize();

Assert.True(mock.WasExposed<IAppService>());

Properties

ExposedCount

Returns the number of services exposed.

public int ExposedCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Methods

Dispose()

Marks the mock as disposed. Subsequent operations throw.

public void Dispose()

Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?)

Registers a service as if Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?) was called. The implementation is recorded for later assertions.

public void Expose<T>(T implementation, BridgeOptions? options = null) where T : class

Parameters

implementation T
options BridgeOptions

Type Parameters

T

GetExposedImplementation<T>()

Returns the implementation passed to Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?), or null.

public T? GetExposedImplementation<T>() where T : class

Returns

T

Type Parameters

T

GetProxy<T>()

Returns a proxy for the given interface. Must have been set up via SetupProxy<T>(T) first.

public T GetProxy<T>() where T : class

Returns

T

Type Parameters

T

Remove<T>()

Removes an exposed service.

public void Remove<T>() where T : class

Type Parameters

T

Reset()

Resets all state.

public void Reset()

SetupProxy<T>(T)

Configures a mock proxy that will be returned by GetProxy<T>().

public void SetupProxy<T>(T proxy) where T : class

Parameters

proxy T

Type Parameters

T

WasExposed<T>()

Returns whether Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?) was called for the given interface.

public bool WasExposed<T>() where T : class

Returns

bool

Type Parameters

T
